subject: URGENT: Drug Recall Notice - Acetaminophen Batch LOT-A45
body:
Dear Jaya Aditya,

This is an urgent notification regarding a recall for Acetaminophen, Batch ID LOT-A45. Please take immediate action to quarantine and return any units of this batch. Further instructions will follow.

Sincerely,
Proactive Recall Orchestrator
